cot_prefix: Okay, let's tackle this question. The passage is about Chinese college students visiting the Yellow River Station in Norway's Arctic. The question asks which statement is true about Wu Jinyou. First, I need to find where Wu Jinyou is mentioned. Let me scan through the text again. Here's the relevant part: "Wu Jinyou, head of the Polar Research Institute of China, and the group's leader, said, 'I hope the students have not only a field trip to the Yellow River station, but are also touched by the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers here. I also expect in the future, some of them will choose to devote themselves to polar research and maybe even work with us.'" So, looking at the options: (A) He is a graduate from Dalian Marinetime University. The passage mentions Zheng Li as a student from Dalian Marinetime University, but there's no info about Wu Jinyou's education. So A is probably false. (B) He is the president of Dalian Marinetime University. No, he's the head of the Polar Research Institute of China. The university mentioned is where Zheng Li studies. So B is incorrect. (C) He thinks highly of the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers. His quote says he hopes the students are "touched by the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers." That implies he himself thinks highly of their devotion
